action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Dassler-Alfheim, Carpenter, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Habush Sinykin, Spreitzer and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Palmeri, Snodgrass, Mayadev, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Joers, Johnson, Madison, Miresse, Prado, Sinicki, Subeck, Tenorio, Udell and Vining
